sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82790" key="petrokatoi/khtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πετρο-κατοίκητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82790.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having its abode in the rocks</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀχώ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0203.tlg001:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Limen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
